headline: Nicolas Verkooijen joins SV Darmstadt on free transfer
body: Nicolas Verkooijen has completed a free transfer to SV Darmstadt after rejecting a contract extension with PSV.
text:
🚨🏁 Exclusive news, official and confirmed. Nicolas Verkooijen here with Paul Fernie.




Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨💥 EXCL | Nicolas Verkooijen to SV Darmstadt - DONE DEAL ✔️

Full agreement reached with 19 y/o talented Belgian attacking midfielder.

Medical scheduled for next week. Free transfer from PSV after rejecting contract extension. Strong competition from clubs. Darmstadt have won the race. Long-term contract agreed.

@SkySportDE 🇧🇪





— https://nitter.net/Plettigoal/status/2067574335661871268#m
draft_caption:
💎 SIGNED & SEALED | Nicolas Verkooijen has finalized his move to SV Darmstadt!
